# 🛠️ Blade Forge
**skill** · swordsman · knowledge

6D blade configuration mechanics. 64 vertices (2⁶), 96 edges. Pascal tier distribution across strata. Hexagram mapping for sovereignty states. Core identity: neg(bnot(x))=succ(x).
